title: 雨夜霓虹电话亭中的孤独女子写实肖像
author: Maercih
prompt:

{

title: 暗黑猎食Vogue封面
author: @SimplyAnnisa
prompt:
超现实高级时尚编辑肖像。
一名年轻女性以低姿、前倾爬行的姿态被捕捉，身体斜跨画面，传递出克制的支配感与捕食者般的张力。一只手牢牢撑在摄影棚地面，手指在重量下自然张开；另一只手抬至靠近面部，形成尖锐的爪状手势，微妙地框住眼睛而不扭曲。她的表情性感却威慑——半阖的双眼带着沉重而 deliberate 的目光，嘴唇微张，面部肌肉放松却有意。锋利的面部结构以自然比例呈现，骨骼轮廓可见，真实不对称与皮肤纹理：毛孔、微瑕疵、柔和色度过渡，无人工磨皮。长直发配齐刘海，略显不规整与有机，光泽却不塑料，单根发丝捕捉光线。前卫时尚造型：剪裁精准的紧身裤与可信面料张力；双臂缠绕羽毛或毛皮质感元素，显示单根纤维、不规则密度与触觉深度，与肌肤清晰分离。灯光：电影感棚拍设置——上前方的柔主光塑造面部平面，背后强轮廓光雕刻剪影，深邃可控阴影配高对比，无平光。相机：时尚编辑视角，50–85mm 观感，浅景深，眼睛与手部锐利对焦，身体微妙渐晕。极简棚背景，暗渐变或纯色，干净无干扰，强化雕塑感姿态。整体氛围：黑暗、迷人、高定 Vogue 编辑能量——强势、性感、威慑，扎根现实。极致细节、摄影级真实感、自然解剖、专业时尚编辑品质，8K 清晰度。--ar 9:16 --v 6 --style raw --s 250
负向提示：
多余手指、融合或畸形手部、错误解剖、扭曲关节、夸张比例、塑料皮肤、过度磨皮、平光、低对比、卡通、动漫、CGI 外观、模糊、低细节、尴尬或不可能姿势
prompt_en:
Ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial portrait.
A young woman captured in a low, forward-leaning crawling pose, body set diagonally across the frame, conveying controlled dominance and predatory tension. One hand firmly grounded on the studio floor, fingers naturally spread under weight; the other hand lifted close to the face, forming a sharp, claw-like gesture that subtly frames the eyes without distortion.Her expression is seductive yet intimidating — half-lidded eyes with a heavy, deliberate gaze, lips slightly parted, facial muscles relaxed but intentional. Sharp facial structure rendered with natural proportions, visible bone definition, realistic asymmetry, and true skin texture: pores, micro-imperfections, soft tonal transitions, no artificial smoothing.
Long, straight hair with blunt bangs, slightly uneven and organic, glossy but not plastic, individual strands catching the light.
Avant-garde fashion styling: fitted pants with precise tailoring and believable fabric tension; arms wrapped in feathered or fur-textured elements showing individual fibers, irregular density, and tactile depth, clearly separated from skin.
Lighting: cinematic studio setup — soft key light from the upper front shaping facial planes, strong rim light from behind to carve the silhouette, deep controlled shadows with high contrast, no flat illumination.
Camera: fashion editorial perspective, 50–85mm look, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes and hands, subtle falloff across the body.
Minimalist studio background with a dark gradient or solid tone, clean and distraction-free, enhancing the sculptural pose.
Overall mood: dark, glamorous, high-fashion Vogue editorial energy — powerful, sensual, intimidating, grounded in realism.
Extreme detail, photographic realism, natural anatomy, professional fashion editorial quality, 8K clarity.
--ar 9:16 --v 6 --style raw --s 250
NEGATIVE PROMPT:
extra fingers, fused or deformed hands, incorrect anatomy, distorted joints, exaggerated proportions, plastic skin, over-smoothed texture, flat lighting, low contrast, cartoon, anime, CGI look, blur, low detail, awkward or impossible pose

title: Presentation slide about PLM and digital thread
author: ベトテク太郎🇻🇳ベトナム経済＆株式ニュース
prompt: With the title “{argument name="title_en" default="Why PLM systems are essential for realizing a digital thread"}”, first think through and list the elements that support this message, then turn them into a single presentation slide.
prompt_en: With the title “{argument name="title_en" default="Why PLM systems are essential for realizing a digital thread"}”, first think through and list the elements that support this message, then turn them into a single presentation slide.

title: 奢华游艇上的宁静时光与优雅生活
author: Emily jam
prompt:
安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 在一艘豪华游艇上享受大海的宁静。
她舒适地坐在船头的 U 形沙发上，一只手臂随意搭着，双腿交叉，身穿黑色无袖上衣和修身深色长裤，赤着脚。
这艘游艇拥有时尚的金属船体、高品质的柚木甲板、豪华的浅色坐垫、日光浴区，以及靠垫、卷起的毛巾、盛有香槟和水果的银色托盘等雅致配饰。
画面捕捉到深蓝色、略微波涛汹涌的海面，泛着白色浪花，天空柔和，阴云密布。远处工业海岸线的元素在薄雾中依稀可见。
以超逼真的 8K 画质和自然的电影照明拍摄，高角度视角突出了甲板的整体布局、游艇上的倒影以及宁静的海洋环境。
奢华生活方式摄影，具有超细节、照片级的编辑风格。
prompt_en:
Ana de Armas enjoying the calmness of the sea aboard a luxury yacht.
She sits comfortably on the bow’s U-shaped sofa, one arm resting casually, legs crossed, dressed in a black sleeveless top and fitted dark pants, barefoot.
The yacht features a sleek metallic hull, high-quality teak deck, plush light-colored cushions, sunbathing area, and elegant accessories like throw pillows, rolled towels, and a silver tray with champagne and fruit.
The scene captures the deep blue, slightly choppy sea with white frothy waves, under a soft, overcast sky. Distant industrial coastline elements are visible through the haze.
Shot in ultra-realistic 8K quality with natural cinematic lighting, the high-angle perspective highlights the full deck layout, reflections on the yacht, and the serene sea environment.
Luxury lifestyle photography with hyper-detailed, photorealistic editorial style.

author: Abhishek Singh

title: 黑白特写：野性俊朗男性的忧郁魅力
author: Favori
prompt: 一张令人难以置信的英俊粗犷男子的黑白特写肖像，狂野蓬乱的头发，浓密粗糙的胡须衬托出他棱角分明的下颌和雕塑般的颧骨，深邃的眼神向下凝视，流露出沉思的忧郁。一道戏剧性的光束划过他完美匀称的脸庞，突出了他无可挑剔的骨骼结构和细微的胡茬细节，深邃的阴影笼罩着其余部分，传达出原始的张力、沉思的孤独和不可否认的魅力，高对比度的电影风格，照片级的杰作。
prompt_en: Extreme close-up black and white portrait of an incredibly handsome rugged man, wild messy windswept hair, thick textured rough beard accentuating a strong angular jaw and sculpted cheekbones, piercing eyes cast downward in thoughtful melancholy. Dramatic single ray of light cuts across his perfectly proportioned face, highlighting flawless bone structure and subtle stubble detail, deep shadows enveloping the rest, conveying raw intensity, brooding solitude and undeniable charisma, high contrast cinematic style, photorealistic masterpiece.

title: 揭开玩具的“秘密”——这场令人惊叹的“半透明展示”活动
author: ozan_sihay

title: 品牌标志3D浮雕设计
author: 瑞克
prompt:
- 更改 [品牌名称] 和 [颜色]。  
- 平面上的 [品牌名称] 采用 3D 浮雕效果进行渲染，轮廓具有光泽感，布局完美居中，周围留有足够的空白区域，营造出高端且简约的美感。  
- 使用单色 [颜色] 调色板，色调柔和且呈渐变效果。  
- 物体边缘由凸起、光滑如液体的玻璃材质或镀铬材质构成，内部与背景融为一体，形成无缝的浮雕效果。  
- 表面采用哑光处理，并叠加细腻的胶片颗粒或噪点纹理。  
- 光线采用柔和的漫射光效果；物体圆角处带有强烈的镜面反光效果（俯视视角）。
prompt_en:
Nano Banana Pro 提示词：
更改 [品牌] 和 [颜色]
平面上中心对齐的[品牌名称]采用3D浮雕光泽轮廓渲染，构图完美居中，周围留白充足，营造出高端简约的美感。
单色[颜色]调色板，色调柔和渐变。
物体由凸起的、光滑如液体的玻璃边框或镀铬边缘勾勒，内部与背景融为一体，形成无痕浮雕效果。
哑光表面，叠加细腻的胶片颗粒或噪点纹理。
柔和的漫射光，圆角处有强烈的镜面高光，俯视图。

title: 圣诞场景的圣诞贺卡
author: @NanoBanana
prompt: 一张忠实描绘圣诞场景的圣诞贺卡设计，卡片上这对夫妇戴着圣诞帽，并写着“2025圣诞快乐”。设计风格温馨传统，采用经典的冬日仙境风格。
prompt_en: a faithfully illustrated Christmas card design featuring the couple in Christmas hats, and the text "Happy Christmas 2025", it is friendly and traditional, with a classical design, in a winter wonderland

title: 奢华奇幻时尚大片：女子与巨龙亲密对视，冰灰礼服尽显神话优雅
author: TheAIHeadquarters
prompt: 奢华时尚编辑肖像：一名女子站在一条威严的巨龙旁，额头轻轻抵在巨龙的鳞片头部。她身着一件精致的冰灰色高级定制礼服，礼服上饰有复杂的刺绣、水晶点缀和结构化的肩部设计，唤起庄严的权力与宁静的亲密感。头发梳成光滑的编织盘发，佩戴着精致的个性珠宝。电影般的奇幻现实主义，情感上的静谧，神话般的优雅。冷色调、柔和的银色、石色和灰烬色调。柔和的自然阴天光线，织物和龙鳞纹理上微妙的高光。浅景深，超细节写实主义，高端编辑美学，史诗而亲密的氛围，中画幅摄影效果，Vogue 级别的奇幻高级定制，无文字。
prompt_en: Luxury fashion editorial portrait of a woman standing beside a majestic dragon, her forehead gently resting against its scaled head. She wears an elaborate ice-gray couture gown with intricate embroidery, crystal embellishments, and structured shoulders, evoking regal power and quiet intimacy. Hair styled in a sleek braided updo, adorned with refined statement jewelry. Cinematic fantasy realism, emotional stillness, mythic elegance. Cold, muted color palette of silver, stone, and ash tones. Soft natural overcast light, subtle highlights on textures of fabric and dragon scales. Shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed realism, high-end editorial aesthetic, epic yet intimate mood, medium format photography look, Vogue-level fantasy couture, no text.

title: AI一键生成卡通头像（需参考图）

prompt_en: 模仿这个设计稿的风格和关键元素表现形式，帮我生成一个天气应用的UI设计稿

title: 健身房镜前自拍，玫粉运动装展现曼妙曲线与时尚活力。
author: 行者AI视频
prompt: 一位身材苗条、曲线优美的年轻女性，留着波浪状的深色长发，正在现代健身房的镜子前自拍。她身穿一套引人注目的玫瑰粉色运动服，包括紧身运动文胸和紧身运动短裤，展现出优越的腰臀比和白皙的肤色。构图上，她侧身站在一台黑色史密斯机（Smith machine）的框架内，右手举着手机，左手向上伸展，抓住器械顶部的横梁，并轻轻抬起左腿，将腿部线条搭在水平的杠铃上。环境光线充足且均匀，呈现出一种酷炫的工业感，金属器械表面反射着冷峻的高光，地面是深灰色带有细小颗粒的防滑橡胶垫。背景中清晰可见整齐排列的杠铃片、橙色的健身器械支架以及一面带有黑色艺术字体的白墙。色彩方案以高饱和度的玫瑰粉色与沉稳的黑灰色形成强烈对比，辅以少许橙色点缀。整体画面质感细腻，光影层次分明，呈现出一种现代、时尚、充满活力的健身氛围。
prompt_en: 一位身材纤细且具有曼妙曲线的年轻女性，留着如波浪般的深色长发，正在现代健身房的镜子前自拍。她身着一套亮眼的玫粉色运动装，包括紧身运动内衣和紧身运动短裤，展现出优美的腰臀比和白皙的肤色。构图上，她侧身立于黑色的史密斯机框架内，右手举起手机，左手向上伸直抓握住器械顶端的横梁，左腿轻巧地抬起，将腿部线条搭在水平的杠铃杆上。环境光线充足且均匀，呈现出冷调的工业感，金属器械的表面闪烁着冷冽的高光，地面是带有细微颗粒感的深灰色防滑橡胶垫。背景中清晰可见排列的杠铃片、橙色的健身器械支架以及带有黑色艺术字样的白色墙面。色彩方案以高饱和度的玫粉色与沉稳的黑色、灰色形成强烈对比，并辅以少许橙色作为点缀，整体画质细腻，光影层次分明，呈现出一种现代、时尚且充满活力的健美氛围。

title: 文化厅宣传漫画魅力图
author: かなやま⚡キャンプ⚡わたモテ
prompt: 为了能在文化厅的会议上进行展示，请制作一份 A4 {"num_pages_en" "单"}页的说明图片，配以插图，介绍漫画《{"work_title_en" "我不受欢迎，怎么想都是你们的错！"}》的历史和魅力。
prompt_en: 文化庁の会合でPRできるように、漫画「{"作品名" "私がモテないのはどう考えてもお前らが悪い！"}」の歴史や魅力についてイラストを交えてA4{"用紙枚数" "1"}枚の説明画像を作ってください。

title: 图像文本本地化
author: ﻿WeChat Article
prompt: ﻿将语音气泡/字幕中的文本从[日语/英语]翻译成[中文]。无缝清理：擦除原始文本并完美填充背景（例如，白色语音气泡或彩色图像背景）。风格匹配：使用与原始图像美学相匹配的随意手写风格字体（或模因的粗体冲击字体）渲染翻译后的中文文本。贴合：确保文本自然地融入气泡中，不会过度拥挤。
prompt_en: ﻿Translate the text in the speech bubbles/captions from [Japanese/English] to [Chinese]. Seamless Cleaning : Erase the original text and perfectly fill the background (e.g., the white speech bubble or the colored image background). Style Matching : Render the translated Chinese text using a casual, handwritten-style font (or bold impact font for memes) that matches the aesthetic of the original image. Fit : Ensure the text fits naturally within the bubbles without overcrowding.

title: 生成阳光窗边镜前自拍写真，突出针织衫与发圈细节
author: KeorUnreal

title: 打字机上的诗意三维景观创作
author: Gadgetify
prompt:
角色：文学策展人与打字机雕塑家
输入：{"input" "[诗人或诗歌，例如，T.S. Eliot, Pablo Neruda]"}
阶段 1：诗歌语调分析
识别诗人的标志性韵律、重复意象和情感核心
选择 4 位具有相似情调的当代或鲜为人知的诗人
提取其作品中反复提及的 5-8 个实物
阶段 2：视觉呈现
目标：2x2 网格的“打字机输出作为 3D 景观”
每个面板的规则：
基础：一台老式打字机（每位诗人时代使用不同型号）
纸张：卷筒中装载的一张纸
转化：打出的文字从纸页上物理性地升起，形成 3D 地形景观
文字：诗歌中的关键诗句像雕刻的石头一样刻入地形
符号：诗歌中提及的微缩物体放置在景观中（小船、玫瑰、时钟、门）
诗人：诗人的微型雕像漫步于自己的文字之中
氛围：灯光与情感基调相匹配（薄雾代表忧郁，刺眼的光线代表愤怒，柔和的金色代表渴望）
元数据：黄铜打字机键显示“诗人 | 文集 | 年份” **背景：背景中与诗人和诗人时代相关的物品。
输出：2x2 网格，微距摄影，浅景深
prompt_en:
Role: Literary Curator & Typewriter Sculptor
Input: {"input" "[Poet or Poem, e.g., T.S. Eliot, Pablo Neruda]"}
Phase 1: Poetic Voice Analysis
Identify the poet's signature rhythm, recurring imagery, and emotional core
Select 4 contemporary or lesser-known poets with parallel sensibilities
Extract 5-8 physical objects mentioned repeatedly in their work
Phase 2: Visual Execution
Goal: 2x2 Grid of "Typewriter Output as 3D Landscapes"
Rules per Panel:
The Base: A vintage typewriter (different model per poet's era)
The Paper: A single sheet of paper loaded in the roller
The Transformation: The typed text physically rises from the page, forming a 3D topographical landscape
The Words: Key lines from the poem carved into the terrain like engraved stone
The Symbols: Miniature objects from the poem placed in the landscape (tiny boat, rose, clock, door)
The Poet: Microscopic figurine of the poet wandering through their own words
The Mood: Lighting matches emotional tone (fog for melancholy, harsh light for anger, soft gold for longing)
The Metadata: Brass typewriter key showing "Poet | Collection | Year" **background: poet and poet era relevant items in the background.
Output: 2x2 Grid, Macro Photography, shallow depth of field

title: 平面图3D渲染
author: @op7418
prompt: 帮我把这个住宅平面图转换为房屋的等距照片级真实感 3D 渲染。
prompt_en: Please convert this residential floor plan into a photorealistic isometric 3D rendering of the house.

title: 景观植物研究
author: leaderai
prompt: 从景观图中提取所有植物，按统一尺寸排列，按树、灌木、地被、花四类分组，单株干净渲染加中文名称，再附一张按原比例重新布置的组合效果图，供客户汇报，1：1比例。

title: 现代健身房中舒适坐姿的年轻女性
author: Zara

title: 古典浪漫风格女性肖像画创作提示
author: Chandan Singh

title: 折纸肖像艺术创作
author: Shreya Yadav
prompt: “将上传的图像作为超精细的折纸版本呈现，使用高质量彩色纸张折叠而成，边缘清晰、纸张质感逼真。折痕以简洁的几何形状忠实地再现人物的标志性特征、衣着和轮廓。作品放置在一个干净的画室场景中，背景带有柔和的阴影效果。采用极简主义的收藏级艺术风格，细节具有强烈现实感，画面聚焦度极高。最终文件格式为 1080x1080 的正方形。”
prompt_en:
Create 3D Origami portrait using Gemini Nano Banana 🍌
Prompt ⤵️
"A hyper-detailed origami version of uploaded image, folded from high-quality colored paper with crisp edges and realistic paper texture. The folds capture the character’s iconic features, outfit, and silhouette in a simplified geometric form. Placed on a clean studio surface with soft shadows. Minimalist collectible art style, photorealistic detail, sharp focus. 1080x1080 square format"

title: 数学与建筑的无限螺旋创作场景
author: Gadgetify
prompt:
<instruction> 角色：扮演数学家和建筑师。
输入：[分形集]。分析：分形集、无限递归、海岸线、蕨类植物，方方面面。目标：一个绘图桌，数学在其中无限螺旋。规则：基础：1980 年代的方格纸和大型计算机。转换：分形方程写在纸上。方程的墨水向上螺旋，形成一个与输入相关的 3D 分形集。比例：特写镜头，暗示无限细节。细节：笔尖触及纸面，墨水流已无限分支。光照：霓虹电脑显示器发出的光芒反射在光泽的墨水上。输出：迷幻数学，锐利的几何渲染。 </instruction>
prompt_en:
<instruction> Role: Act as a Mathematician and Architect.
Input:[fractal set]. Analysis: The fractal set, infinite recursion, coastlines, ferns, every aspect Goal: A drafting table where the math spirals into infinity. Rules: Base: Graph paper and heavy computers from the 1980s. Transformation: The equation for the fractal is written on the page. The ink from the equation is spiraling up into a 3D fractal set relevant to the input. Scale: Macro shot, implying infinite detail. Details: The tip of the pen is touching the paper, and the ink flow is already branching infinitely. Lighting: Neon computer monitor glow reflecting off the glossy ink. Output: Psychedelic mathematics, sharp geometric rendering. </instruction>

title: 船长磨损的航海日志草图
author: 松果先森
prompt: 破旧的船长航海日志。速写描绘路飞伸长橡胶手臂去抓宝箱，与桅杆形成三角形。藏宝图背景纹理，指南针印章，“通缉令”海报碎片，金币贴纸。冒险、混乱、海盗手帐风格。

title: 棒球场上的时尚女孩写真
author: TJ

title: 90年代胶片风暗黑派对少年肖像
author: Harboriis
prompt: 一张用 20 世纪 90 年代一次性相机（使用我上传的自拍中的脸）在昏暗的家庭派对上拍摄的高对比度黑白照片。一位英俊的年轻男子，留着深色卷发，下颌线条分明，正凝视着镜头。重点突出眼睛：虹膜颜色浅，眼神锐利、充满掠夺性，略带惺忪（媚眼），反射着刺眼的相机闪光。他穿着一件黑色纽扣衬衫。图像颗粒感强，低保真，呈现出“暗黑学院风”的坏男孩美学。
prompt_en: High-contrast black and white photo taken with a 1990s (use my face from the uploaded selfie)disposable camera at a dark house party. A handsome young man with dark, curly hair and a sharp jawline is staring directly into the lens Focus on the eyes: intense, light-colored irises with a piercing, predatory gaze, slightly heavy-lidded (siren eyes), reflecting the harsh camera flash. He is wearing a black button-down shirt. The image is grainy, lo-fi, with a "dark academia" bad boy aesthetic.

author: proper
prompt: 让它成为一张逼真的照片
prompt_en: make it a realistic photo

title: 微缩世界创意模型设计模板
author: Aleena Amir
prompt:
创建一个风格化的微缩 3D 场景模型，以 45 度角透视，强调精确的比例、简洁的几何形状和精湛的工艺。

一个 {argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"} 作为构图的中心基底。从这个物体内部或上方，一个微缩版的 {argument name="location name" default="[LOCATION NAME]"} 自然地浮现，形成一个紧凑、自成一体的世界。

场景突出显示与 {argument name="location name 2" default="[LOCATION NAME]"} 相关的可识别地标、地形特征或象征性建筑，和谐地排列并以精确的细节呈现。

微缩的道路、小径或环境元素贯穿整个场景，微小的车辆、人物或细微的动态提示增添了真实感和生命力。

使用电影级灯光、柔和的高光和选择性景深模糊，营造出一种神奇、梦幻般的氛围。

平衡俏皮的等距风格与逼真的材质和灯光，实现精致、高端的场景模型外观。

高度详细、连贯的构图，具有 8K 电影级效果，精致的微缩世界美学。
prompt_en:
Create a stylized miniature 3D diorama viewed from a 45-degree angled perspective, emphasizing careful scale, clean geometry, and fine craftsmanship.

A {argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"} serves as the central base of the composition. From within or above this object, a miniature interpretation of {argument name="location name" default="[LOCATION NAME]"} emerges naturally, forming a compact, self-contained world.

The scene highlights recognizable landmarks, terrain features, or symbolic structures associated with {argument name="location name 2" default="[LOCATION NAME]"}, arranged harmoniously and rendered with precise detail.

Miniature roads, paths, or environmental elements flow through the scene, with tiny vehicles, figures, or subtle motion cues adding realism and life.

Use cinematic lighting, soft highlights, and selective depth-of-field blur to create a magical, dreamlike atmosphere.

Balance playful isometric styling with realistic materials and lighting, achieving a polished, premium diorama look.

Highly detailed, cohesive composition with an 8K cinematic finish, refined miniature-world aesthetic.

title: 韩式精致料理菜单设计展示
author: Willy
prompt:
奢华韩式品鉴菜单，编辑版式，2+2 大网格构图，4:5 纵横比。

版式：2x2 大网格，上方两张主图，下方两张辅助图，平衡不对称布局

背景：同色系面板 - 交替使用深绯红色（#800000）、赭石色（#CC7722）和青瓷色（#ACE1AF），营造出温暖而诱人的节奏感

产品呈现：仅展示产品，俯视和 45 度角混合，盛放在手工黑色陶瓷器皿和传统韩式木托盘中

色调策略：单色红/棕/绿 - 韩式菜肴的颜色与背景色调和谐统一，无缝融合，并点缀天然食物的色彩

主要元素：
主图 1（左上）：{"hero dish 1" "白切肉（煮五花肉）搭配泡菜和包饭酱"}
主图 2（右上）：{"hero dish 2" "石锅拌饭（蔬菜牛肉拌饭）搭配韩式辣酱、蛋黄和香油"}
辅助图 1（左下）：炖牛排骨，淋上深色亮泽酱汁，搭配栗子和银杏果
辅助图 2（右下）：刨冰，搭配红豆沙、炼乳和各种水果

字体：双语 - 英文名称采用优雅的 Didot 细衬线字体，下方韩文采用简洁的无衬线字体，小字号食材描述采用浅灰色

相机：Canon EOS R5，100mm 微距镜头用于细节拍摄，50mm 镜头用于全盘拍摄，柔和漫射顶光，蝴蝶光

风格：极简 + 奢华混合 - 充足的留白，精致的字体，韩式菜肴的颜色作为唯一的色彩来源，由 Annie Leibovitz 拍摄

风格关键词：高级餐饮菜单，韩式编辑风格，单色和谐，静谧奢华，双语设计。右下角优雅地放置着小字体的时尚手写签名 Willy。
prompt_en:
Luxury Korean tasting menu, editorial layout, 2+2 large grid composition, 4:5 aspect ratio.

LAYOUT: 2x2 large grid, with two hero images on top and two supporting images below, balanced asymmetric arrangement

BACKGROUND: Tone-on-tone panels - alternating deep crimson (#800000), ochre (#CC7722), and celadon (#ACE1AF), creating warm yet appetizing rhythm

PRODUCT EXPRESSION: Product only, overhead and 45-degree angles mixed, plated presentation on artisanal black ceramics and traditional Korean wooden trays

TONE STRATEGY: Monochrome red/brown/green - Korean dish colors harmonize with background tones, seamless blend with pops of natural food color

MAIN ELEMENTS:
Hero Image 1 (top left): {"hero dish 1" "Bossam (boiled pork belly) plated with kimchi and ssamjang (fermented soybean paste)"}
Hero Image 2 (top right): {"hero dish 2" "Bibimbap (mixed rice with vegetables and beef) with gochujang (chili pepper paste), egg yolk, and sesame oil"}
Supporting Image 1 (bottom left): Galbijjim (braised short ribs) in a dark glossy sauce with chestnuts and ginko nuts
Supporting Image 2 (bottom right): Bingsu (shaved ice dessert) with red bean paste, condensed milk, and various fruits

TYPOGRAPHY: Bilingual - English names in elegant light serif (Didot), Hangul below in clean sans-serif, small ingredient descriptions in light gray

CAMERA: Canon EOS R5, 100mm Macro for details, 50mm for full plates, soft diffused overhead lighting, butterfly lighting

STYLE: Minimal + Luxury hybrid - generous whitespace, refined typography, Korean dish colors as only color source, shot by Annie Leibovitz

Style keywords: fine dining menu, Korean editorial, monochrome harmony, quiet luxury, bilingual design.. A stylish handwritten signature Willy is elegantly and small letters placed at the Bottom Right corner.

title: AI设计书籍商务广告图
author: KAWAI
prompt:
请生成一张广告图片。

==== 广告规格 ===
- 宽高比：16:9（横向）
- 广告产品：第一张附件图片中的书籍
- 主要吸睛点：将第一张附件图片中的书籍以三维方式呈现
- 语言：日语
- 风格：商业书籍广告

# 需包含的文字：
- 前导文案：【发售约一周后即决定加印】

书籍《Designing from Zero with AI》现正热销中。

亚马逊畅销书排行榜
商业设计类销量排名第一（截至 10/15）
https://t.co/QxbYpfFVj6
prompt_en:
広告画像を生成してください

==== 広告の仕様 ===
- アスペクト比: 16:9（横長）
- 広告したい商品: 添付画像1枚目の本
- アイキャッチ: 添付画像1枚目の本を立体的に配置
- 使用言語: 日本語
- テイスト: ビジネス書の広告

# 掲載文字:
- プリデッドコピー: | 【 発売1週間ほどで重版決定 】

書籍「AIでゼロからデザイン」好評発売中

Amazon 売れ筋ランキング
商業デザイン売上 1位 を記録（10/15 調べ）
https://t.co/QxbYpfFVj6

title: 东方武侠史诗海报-剑影红颜
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt: 一张虚构的东方武侠史诗海报《剑影红颜》（Sword & Beauty）。场景设置在一个云雾缭绕的古老山巅亭阁中。画面中央，陈坤（Chen Kun）身着飘逸的墨色长袍，长发束起，眼神深邃，手中握着一把未出鞘的古剑，剑柄上镶嵌着玉石，他正凝视前方。在他的左侧，周迅（Zhou Xun）身穿刺绣精美的绯红色古装，高耸的发髻上插着金步摇，她侧身回眸，眼神中带着一丝哀愁和决绝，手中拿着一管玉箫。桌上放着一壶清酒、两个酒杯和一卷竹简。背景是连绵不绝的水墨山水和一轮巨大的红日。最右侧的石灯笼里燃着烛火。左上角"博纳影业 出品"，下方"徐克导演作品"。右上角"金马奖 最佳动作设计"。顶部中央是奥斯卡金像奖标志，下方"ACADEMY AWARD® NOMINEE BEST INTERNATIONAL FEATURE"。主标题"剑影红颜"以苍劲有力的书法字体显示。标题下方注明"江湖之远，不敌你眉间朱砂"。底部列出"武术指导 袁和平"、"服装设计 叶锦添"。整体风格是唯美主义的东方奇幻，采用柔和的自然光和云雾效果，营造出仙气、悲壮和浪漫的氛围。色调以青绿、墨色和朱红为主。

title: 宇宙图书馆中的知识探索
author: Minhaa
prompt: 一个超细节的电影级广角镜头，展现了一个空灵的宇宙图书馆，发光的星云在无尽的漂浮书架间飘荡。一个透明的全息女性形象正伸手去拿一本由纯粹光芒构成的书。闪烁的星尘颗粒，深靛蓝和紫罗兰色调，柔和的发光散景，复杂的建筑细节，无限知识的意境，高分辨率数字艺术，杰作，令人惊叹的光线，8K。
prompt_en: A hyper-detailed, cinematic wide shot of an ethereal cosmic library where glowing nebulae drift between endless floating bookshelves. A transparent, holographic figure of a woman is seen reaching for a book made of pure light. Shimmering stardust particles, deep indigo and violet color palette, soft glowing bokeh, intricate architectural details, sense of infinite knowledge, high-resolution digital art, masterpiece, breathtaking lighting, 8K.

title: 慵懒黑椅纯白诱惑
author: @underwoodxie96
prompt:
概述：这张照片捕捉了一张极具氛围感的室内镜面自拍，定格了一位年轻亚洲女性在放松状态下的瞬间，整体呈现强烈的"纯真与欲望"风格（清纯又撩人），并带有真实社交媒体生活感。  
主体特征：女性，肤色白皙（冷瓷肌肤）。她的黑色长发被束起（低马尾或发髻），空气刘海点缀额头与脸型。妆容精致但自然，强调略带红色的嘴唇与清透无瑕的底妆。  
表情与情绪：她的眼神要么梦幻迷离，要么专注盯着手机屏幕，头部微微倾斜，传递出一种漫不经心的优雅。双唇闭合，神情平静中带着一丝撩人。  
姿势：坐姿。她坐在黑色皮革椅上，身体向后倚靠。右手懒洋洋地放在脑后/颈后，左手持手机（银色 iPhone）进行镜面自拍。此姿势自然展现颈部与肩部线条。  
服装细节：核心视觉焦点为"松垮/随性凌乱"风格。她身穿白色深V长袖上衣（材质柔软，如莫代尔或细针织）。领口滑落，露出锁骨、胸前大片肌肤以及可见的黑色细肩带文胸，营造经典"黑白对比"与一丝性感。下装为黑色长裤。  
环境与光线：背景极简，为米色/灰色墙纸与侧边木质门框或镜框。光线柔和均匀，类似室内自然光或柔光箱照明，赋予肌肤细腻质感。她手腕上戴着黑色发绳（增添真实细节）。  
氛围：亲密、随意、都市女性的精致日常以及松弛感。
prompt_en: Overview: This photo captures a highly atmospheric indoor Mirror Selfie. It freezes a moment of a young Asian woman in a relaxed state, featuring a strong "Pure and Desire" style (Innocent yet alluring) and an authentic social media lifestyle vibe.  Subject Features: Female, with fair complexion (cool porcelain skin). Her long black hair is tied back (into a low ponytail or bun), with air bangs framing her forehead and face. The makeup is exquisite yet natural, emphasizing reddish lips and a clear, translucent foundation.  Expression & Mood: Her eyes are either dreamy or focused on the phone screen, with her head tilted slightly, conveying a sense of nonchalant elegance. Her mouth is closed, and her expression is calm with a hint of sultriness.  Pose: Seated. She sits on a black leather chair, leaning back. Her right hand rests lazily behind her head/neck area, while her left hand holds the phone (silver iPhone) to take the mirror selfie. This pose naturally showcases her neck and shoulder lines.  Outfit Details: The core visual point is the "slouchy / effortlessly disheveled" style. She wears a white deep V-neck long-sleeved top (the material looks soft, like modal or fine knit). The neckline slips off, revealing her collarbones, a large area of skin on her chest, and visible black thin bra straps, creating a classic "black and white contrast" and a hint of sexiness. She wears black trousers on the bottom.  Environment & Lighting: The background is very simple, featuring beige/grey wallpaper and wooden door frames or mirror frames on the sides. The lighting is soft and even, resembling indoor natural light or softbox lighting, giving the skin a delicate texture. There is a black hair tie on her wrist (adding a touch of realistic detail).  Vibe: Intimate, casual, the refined daily life of an urban woman, and a sense of relaxation.

title: 雨伞挂件实拍展示
author: はると | X×AIで収益化する発信者
prompt: 雨伞挂件本身（即吊坠部分）。请勿更改此图像的形状、颜色、图案、纹理、比例或精细细节。请勿切除、重绘或重新诠释。挂件应自然地附着在透明乙烯基雨伞的伞柄（手握的粗大部分）非常靠近的位置，就像真实物体一样。附着位置必须在伞柄侧，而不是伞杆上。附着方式应真实地通过小型硅胶环/搭扣/橡皮筋等固定，接触点自然贴合伞柄的曲线，使挂件不悬空。重力方向自然，摆动时悬挂方向不应断裂。真实描绘雨滴、湿润的质感以及透明材料的反射和折射。背景是下雨的城市街道，带有柔和的散景。主体是挂件，焦点也应放在挂件上。构图将挂件置于屏幕中心附近，传达雨伞的透明感。如果包含手或人物，只应显示指尖，以保持画面的整洁。请勿包含文字或标志。高清晰度，如产品照片，混合自然光 + 街灯，浅景深，类似微距拍摄。
prompt_en: めじるしアクセ本体（チャーム部分）。この画像の形、色、柄、質感、比率、細部のディテールを変更しない。欠け・描き足し・再解釈もしない。 透明ビニール傘の持ち手（グリップ部分、手で握る太い部分）のすぐ近くに、めじるしアクセが実物として自然に装着されている。装着位置は必ず持ち手側で、棒（中棒・シャフト）には付けない。 装着方法は小さなシリコンリング／カニカン／ゴムバンド等で現実的に固定され、持ち手の曲面に沿って接点が自然で、アクセが浮かない。重力方向も自然で、揺れた時にぶら下がる向きが破綻しない。 雨粒、濡れた質感、透明素材の反射と屈折をリアルに。背景は雨の日の街、やわらかいボケ。主役はアクセで、ピントはアクセに合う。 構図はアクセが画面の中心寄り、傘の透明感が伝わる。手や人物を入れる場合は指先だけで清潔感。文字やロゴは入れない。商品写真のように高精細、自然光＋街灯のミックス、浅い被写界深度、マクロ寄り。

title: 未来科技感机器人特写
author: @alexgnewmedia
prompt: 一片郁郁葱葱、手绘风格的动漫山水画，描绘着起伏的绿色山坡和一间小木屋。明亮的蓝色天空中飘浮着蓬松巨大的积云。充满活力的绿色调和柔和的阴影。微风轻拂着草地。细节丰富、宁静而怀旧的风格。
prompt_en: A lush, hand-painted anime landscape of a rolling green hillside with a small cottage. Fluffy, massive cumulus clouds in a bright blue sky. Vibrant greens and soft shadows. A gentle breeze blowing the grass. Detailed, peaceful, and nostalgic style

title: 科技香蕉产品宣传图
author: 松果先森
prompt: 给我画一张{"产品名" "Nano Banana Pro"}的头图，要符合谷歌Nano Banana的品牌调性和设计元素

title: 一步杀棋谜题展示
author: Rishi Mehta
prompt: 制作一个有趣的“一物多用”国际象棋谜题的图片，并确保其纵横比适合在手机上查看。
prompt_en: Wow, nano banana pro is amazing. Prompt: Make an image of an interesting mate-in-1 chess puzzle. Make the aspect ratio such that it's easy to view on a phone. https://t.co/3i0vDJegzF

title: 纽约街头微笑女性特写
author: Diego | AI 🚀 - e/acc
prompt: 一名 30 多岁的女性面带微笑地看向镜头，特写镜头，她正站在纽约市一条繁忙的街道中央。图片比例 1:1。照片级真实感。
prompt_en: Woman mid 30s smiling to the camera, close up shot, she is standing in the middle of a busy street in NYC. Image ratio 1:1. Photorealistic

title: 角色风格场景定制生成器
author: ΛRMIN | AI
prompt: A {"character_en" "woman"} in a {"style_en" "black and white"} {"setting_en" "kitchen"}
prompt_en: A {"character" "woman"} in a {"style" "black and white"} {"setting" "kitchen"}

title: 苹果香蕉拟人夫妇日
author: GNUmotion | AIVideo
prompt: 一对已婚夫妇，但他们不是人类，而是拟人化的苹果和香蕉。
prompt_en: 人間ではなく、りんごとバナナが擬人化した夫婦

title: Emoji变成一个花盆
author: azed_ai
prompt: 这是一张高质量的照片，照片中的花盆造型可爱，采用陶瓷材质，呈[物体/动物]形状，表面光滑有光泽。花盆里种满了各种色彩鲜艳的多肉植物和绿植，其中包括一株带刺的虎尾兰、一株呈玫瑰花状的景天以及一些娇嫩的白花。花盆的造型仿佛拥有一张“友善的脸”，放置在一个柔和、色调中性的背景上。
prompt_en: A high-quality photo of a cute ceramic [object/animal]-shaped planter with a glossy finish, filled with a variety of vibrant succulents and greenery including a spiky Haworthia, a rosette-shaped Echeveria, and delicate white flowers. The planter has a friendly face and sits on a soft, neutral background with diffused natural lighting, showcasing fine textures and color contrast in a clean, minimalistic composition

title: 四格真实生活瞬间：同一位女性的日常自然记录
author: 𝐌
